allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8011/api/health" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Body: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8011/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Host "First 200 chars: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
